summary: Comprehensive testing of CONTROL TOWER app completed. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows tested and working. Login, dashboard, all 4 layers (V-HOLD, COST BOSS, POLICY PRIMER, TRUST LADDER), tab navigation, HITL modal, and logout functionality verified.
critical_code_review_comments: All code follows React Native best practices with proper component usage
Backend properly excludes MongoDB _id from responses
JWT authentication working correctly with bcrypt password hashing
All endpoints properly protected with authentication
Environment variables correctly used for URLs and configuration
Seeded demo data working as expected (3 agents, 6 proposals, 3 audit records)
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Using existing seeded demo data: 3 agents (BRUNEL, PSYRENE, GALBUD), 6 proposals with various statuses, 3 audit records, 6 policy rules, 7 cost boss strategies.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full-stack CONTROL TOWER app fully functional. All backend APIs working (health, auth, dashboard, vhold, cost-boss, policy, agents, audit). Frontend UI working with proper mobile-first design, dark theme, all 4 layer cards, tab navigation, HITL modal with approve/deny/hold/escalate actions, agent detail modals, and logout. Demo data includes 3 agents with different trust levels, 6 proposals in various states, and complete policy/cost boss configuration.

test_categories.vhold: 5/5 passed (summary, proposals, filters, detail, decision submission)
test_categories.agents: 2/2 passed (list with 3 demo agents, detail with permission envelope)

frontend_test_results.login_page: ✓ Renders with CONTROL TOWER branding and dark theme
frontend_test_results.login_correct_credentials: ✓ Works and redirects to Tower dashboard
frontend_test_results.login_wrong_password: ✓ Shows error message 'Incorrect email or password'
frontend_test_results.tower_dashboard: ✓ Shows all 4 layer cards (V-HOLD, COST BOSS, POLICY PRIMER, TRUST LADDER)
frontend_test_results.vhold_tab: ✓ Shows proposals with filter chips (all, pending, held, escalated, approved, denied)
frontend_test_results.vhold_proposals: ✓ Found 6 proposal cards with proper status badges
frontend_test_results.hitl_modal: ✓ Opens with proposal details and action buttons
frontend_test_results.cost_boss_tab: ✓ Shows all 7 strategy modes (ECONOMY, STANDARD, REASONING, RESEARCH, PANEL, AGGREGATE, ESCALATE)
frontend_test_results.policy_tab: ✓ Shows 6 policy rule cards with risk levels
frontend_test_results.agents_tab: ✓ Shows 3 agent cards (BRUNEL, PSYRENE, GALBUD) with trust scores
frontend_test_results.agent_detail_modal: ✓ Opens with trust scores, stats, permission envelope, and recent decisions
frontend_test_results.bottom_tab_navigation: ✓ All 5 tabs working (Tower, V-HOLD, Cost, Policy, Agents)
frontend_test_results.logout: ✓ Works and redirects to login page
